hero.name: Ericky
hero.sub: I craft modern web experiences that are fast, accessible, and visually compelling. Let's build something great together.

homeCards.aboutDesc: Trilingual developer from Brazil, living in the Netherlands. 2+ years building modern web apps.
homeCards.expDesc: Co-founder of Fronnexus & ConnectEco. Co-owner of Heavens Hair in Amsterdam.
homeCards.projDesc: 9+ projects built with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, and more.
homeCards.contactDesc: Have a project in mind? Let's connect and build something amazing together.

homePreview.aboutText: I'm Ericky Dias, a trilingual Full Stack Developer (Portuguese, English, Spanish) with 2+ years of experience building modern web applications. With an international background spanning Brazil, Portugal, and the Netherlands, I bring strong cultural adaptability to every project.

about.label: About
about.heading: Crafting
about.p1: I'm Ericky Dias, a trilingual Full Stack Developer (Portuguese, English, Spanish) with 2+ years of experience building modern web applications. With an international background spanning Brazil, Portugal, and the Netherlands, I bring strong cultural adaptability and communication skills to every project.
about.p2_mid1: , I lead an initiative focused on AI education for developers. I also co-founded
about.p2_mid2: , a sustainable tech platform, and co-own
about.p2_suffix: salon in Amsterdam — where I sharpen my soft skills daily through discipline, creativity, and teamwork.
about.p3: I love transforming ideas into beautiful, functional products that make an impact. My training includes bootcamps at TripleTen and Udemy, along with courses at Origamid and Alura.

skills.label: Skills
skills.title: My
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use to bring ideas to life.

descriptions.sons: Leading an initiative focused on AI education for developers. Building educational content and community-driven projects around artificial intelligence and modern web technologies.
descriptions.eco: Co-founded a technology organization focused on sustainable tech solutions and ecological connectivity. Developed web platform and collaborative projects using React, Node.js, and Python. Managed a team of developers and led strategic product planning.
descriptions.heavens: Co-own and operate a hair salon where I sharpen soft skills daily — discipline, creativity, resilience, and teamwork. Handle business operations, client relations, and digital presence.
descriptions.restaurant: Provided customer service in a multicultural environment, communicating in Portuguese, English, and Spanish with international clients. Developed strong interpersonal skills and problem-solving under pressure.
descriptions.oi: Provided customer support at one of Brazil's largest telecommunications companies. Resolved technical and commercial issues via phone and chat. Consistently met satisfaction targets.

education.udemyDetail: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB
education.origamidDetail: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, UI/UX Design

contact.title: Let's
contact.desc: Have a project in mind or want to chat? Fill out the form and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePh: Tell me about your project or idea...

contactExtra.availabilityDesc: Open to full-time, part-time, or freelance work. Flexible hours and available for remote or hybrid positions.
contactExtra.responseTimeDesc: I typically respond within 24 hours. For urgent matters, reach me directly on LinkedIn.
contactExtra.whatIWorkOnDesc: Web applications, landing pages, e-commerce, SaaS platforms, API development, and technical consulting.
contactExtra.iSpeakDesc: Portuguese (native), English (conversational), and Spanish (conversational). Comfortable in multicultural environments.
